label: kerberoastable_accounts_exist
description: Service accounts with SPNs exist that are not machine accounts, making them candidates for Kerberoasting.
evidence_hint: BloodHound users.json: hasspn=true, enabled=true, not a computer account
embed_text: kerberoastable_accounts_exist. Service accounts with SPNs exist that are not machine accounts, making them candidates for Kerberoasting. Evidence: BloodHound users.json: hasspn=true, enabled=true, not a computer account

label: kerberoastable_no_aes_enforcement
description: Kerberoastable accounts do not enforce AES-only encryption, allowing RC4 ticket requests which are faster to crack.
evidence_hint: BloodHound users.json: hasspn=true, supportedencryptiontypes does not include AES256 only
embed_text: kerberoastable_no_aes_enforcement. Kerberoastable accounts do not enforce AES-only encryption, allowing RC4 ticket requests which are faster to crack. Evidence: BloodHound users.json: hasspn=true, supportedencryptiontypes does not include AES256 only

label: no_kerberoast_detection
description: No indication of Kerberoast detection controls (honeypot SPNs, alerting on RC4 TGS requests).
evidence_hint: Absence of known honeypot SPN naming conventions in user set
embed_text: no_kerberoast_detection. No indication of Kerberoast detection controls (honeypot SPNs, alerting on RC4 TGS requests). Evidence: Absence of known honeypot SPN naming conventions in user set

label: asrep_roastable_accounts_exist

embed_text: asrep_roastable_accounts_exist. User accounts exist with Kerberos pre-authentication disabled, allowing AS-REP roasting without credentials. Evidence: BloodHound users.json: dontreqpreauth=true, enabled=true

label: asrep_accounts_have_privileges
description: AS-REP roastable accounts have elevated privileges or group memberships worth targeting.

label: unconstrained_delegation_non_dc

label: constrained_delegation_protocol_transition
description: Accounts with constrained delegation have protocol transition enabled (TrustedToAuthForDelegation), allowing S4U2Self impersonation of any user.

Evidence: BloodHound users/computers: allowedtodelegate not empty, trustedtoauthfordelegation=true

label: container_running_as_root

label: privileged_flag_set

evidence_hint: docker inspect .HostConfig.Privileged == true
embed_text: privileged_flag_set. Container launched with --privileged, granting full host capability set and disabling seccomp/AppArmor. Evidence: docker inspect .HostConfig.Privileged == true

label: cap_sys_admin_present

label: cap_sys_ptrace_present

embed_text: cap_sys_ptrace_present. SYS_PTRACE capability granted. Enables process injection into host PID namespace processes. Evidence: docker inspect .HostConfig.CapAdd contains SYS_PTRACE

label: host_pid_namespace_shared
description: Container shares host PID namespace (--pid=host). Container processes can see and interact with all host processes.
evidence_hint: docker inspect .HostConfig.PidMode == 'host'
embed_text: host_pid_namespace_shared. Container shares host PID namespace (--pid=host). Container processes can see and interact with all host processes. Evidence: docker inspect .HostConfig.PidMode == 'host'

embed_text: sensitive_host_path_mounted. Sensitive host path mounted into container (e.g. /etc, /proc, /sys, /root, /, host filesystem). Evidence: docker inspect .Mounts[] where Source starts with /etc or /proc or /sys or /root or / (host root)

embed_text: apparmor_disabled. AppArmor profile disabled or set to unconfined for this container. Evidence: docker inspect .HostConfig.SecurityOpt contains apparmor=unconfined, or Privileged==true

label: cap_net_admin_present

label: writable_host_path_mounted

label: host_ipc_namespace_shared
description: Container shares host IPC namespace (--ipc=host). Enables shared memory attacks against host processes.
evidence_hint: docker inspect .HostConfig.IpcMode == 'host'
embed_text: host_ipc_namespace_shared. Container shares host IPC namespace (--ipc=host). Enables shared memory attacks against host processes. Evidence: docker inspect .HostConfig.IpcMode == 'host'

label: no_user_namespace_remapping
